The health benefits of Pyrus communis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to alleviate digestive issues and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The most common herbal preparations made with Pyrus communis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
